'''par챦fch챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycoreovirus|mycoreovirus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-r-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycoreovirus|mycoreovirus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| par챦fch챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fth|par챦fch챦fth]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fj|par챦fch챦fj]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fsh|par챦fch챦fsh]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f|par챦fch챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:par챦fr챦fch챦fth|par챦fr챦fch챦fth]] || [[word:par챦fr챦fch챦fj|par챦fr챦fch챦fj]] || [[word:par챦fr챦fch챦fsh|par챦fr챦fch챦fsh]] || [[word:par챦fr챦fch챦f|par챦fr챦fch챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fth|par챦fch챦fth]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fj|par챦fch챦fj]] || [[word:par챦fch챦fsh|par챦fch챦fsh]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f|par챦fch챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fl|par챦fch챦f챦fl]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fl|par챦fch챦f챦fl]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fl|par챦fch챦f챦fl]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fl|par챦fch챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦f챦f|par챦fch챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fn|par챦fch챦f챦fn]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fn|par챦fch챦f챦fn]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fn|par챦fch챦f챦fn]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦fn|par챦fch챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦foro|par챦fch챦f챦foro]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦foro|par챦fch챦f챦foro]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦foro|par챦fch챦f챦foro]] || [[word:par챦fch챦f챦foro|par챦fch챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|270c81a}}
